required_preferences.fact: Preps strictly low-cholesterol, non-fried, unprocessed vegetarian lunches for workdays — excludes all fried and processed foods, and avoids café options to ensure compliance

supersedes.fact: Only meal preps vegetarian lunches for workdays; avoids buying lunch from nearby cafes

required_preferences.fact: Relies solely on her own digital calendar to track family routines and childcare — suspends use of the shared calendar while spouse is away

supersedes.fact: Uses a shared digital calendar with her spouse for all family activities — never relies on verbal reminders

required_preferences.fact: Prefers shorter, one-on-one catch ups with friends over large group gatherings
Uses a lumbar support cushion and avoids meetings requiring all-day sitting; requests standing or walk-and-talk meetings when possible
Only knits small accessories, like hats or scarves — never tackles large projects like sweaters
Prepares all family members’ next-day lunches and snacks the night before in anticipation of early commutes and limited kitchen time on in-office days.

persona: A mid-career accountant at a regional firm specializing in nonprofit organizations
